title: dichanthelium thermale subsp. sericeum
intro: Dichanthelium thermale subsp. sericeum, also known as Silver Bentgrass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. In herbal preparations, Silver Bentgrass is often used as a tea or infused in hot water to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be dried and used in herbal blends to promote respiratory health.
